## Perspective Audit Summary **Component/artifact reviewed:** Modal Dialog With Broken Focus Trap **Perspectives escalated for deep review:** Keyboard Motor, Screen Reader Semantic, Cognitive Neurodivergent **Perspectives at LOW (not reviewed):** Magnification, Contrast, Motion, Auditory --- ### Findings by Severity | Severity | Count | |---|---| | CRITICAL | 2 | | MAJOR | 2 | | MINOR | 0 | | ENHANCEMENT | 0 | --- ### Perspectives That Passed None of the three escalated perspectives passed all checklist items. --- ### Perspectives With Findings — Grouped by ARRM Role #### **Front-End Dev** - **Focus trap missing in modal** — Keyboard Motor — CRITICAL — 2.1.2 - **Modal missing `role="dialog"` and `aria-labelledby`** — Screen Reader Semantic — CRITICAL — 4.1.2 - **No `aria-live` region for success message** — Screen Reader Semantic — MAJOR — 4.1.3 #### **UX Design** - **Background navigation remains focusable in modal** — Keyboard Motor — MAJOR — 2.1.2 - **No focus return to trigger button on modal close** — Keyboard Motor — MAJOR — 2.4.13 #### **Content Author** - **Error messages lack corrective guidance** — Cognitive — MAJOR — 3.3.3 - **Success message not announced to screen readers** — Screen Reader Semantic — MAJOR — 4.1.3 --- ### Open Questions Requiring Human Verification - Success message "Thanks, {name}!" needs content author verification for clarity and completeness - Error messages "Please fill out this field" need content author verification for specificity --- ### Recommended Next Step **REVISE** (MAJOR findings present — address before shipping) --- ## Detailed Findings ### CRITICAL: Focus trap missing in modal **WCAG:** 2.1.2 (Keyboard Accessible) **Perspective:** Keyboard Motor **Severity:** CRITICAL **Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: UX Design) **Evidence:** No focus containment logic in `SubscribeModal` component **Fix:** Add `useEffect` to focus first input on mount and trap focus within modal using `tabindex` and `focus` management ```jsx useEffect(() => { const firstInput = document.getElementById('modal-name'); if (firstInput) firstInput.focus(); }, []); ``` --- ### CRITICAL: Modal missing `role="dialog"` and `aria-labelledby` **WCAG:** 4.1.2 (Name, Role, Value) **Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic **Severity:** CRITICAL **Route to:** Front-End Dev **Evidence:** Modal container lacks `role="dialog"` and `aria-labelledby="modal-title"` **Fix:** Add semantic role and label association to modal container ```jsx
``` --- ### MAJOR: Background navigation remains focusable in modal **WCAG:** 2.1.2 (No Keyboard Trap) **Perspective:** Keyboard Motor **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** UX Design (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** `background-nav` links remain in tab order when modal is open **Fix:** Add `tabindex="-1"` to background content when modal is active ```jsx
``` --- ### MAJOR: No focus return to trigger button on modal close **WCAG:** 2.4.13 (Focus Appearance) **Perspective:** Keyboard Motor **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** UX Design (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** `triggerRef` not focused after modal closes **Fix:** Add focus restoration in `handleClose` ```jsx const handleClose = () => { setIsOpen(false); if (triggerRef.current) triggerRef.current.focus(); }; ``` --- ### MAJOR: Error messages lack corrective guidance **WCAG:** 3.3.3 (Error Suggestion) **Perspective:** Cognitive **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Content Author (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** Default browser error messages used **Fix:** Add `aria-describedby` with specific guidance ```jsx

Please enter a valid email address

``` --- ### MAJOR: Success message not announced to screen readers **WCAG:** 4.1.3 (Status Messages) **Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: Content Author) **Evidence:** No `aria-live` region for success message **Fix:** Wrap success message in `aria-live="polite"` container ```jsx
Thanks, {name}! You're subscribed.
``` --- ## A11y Evidence Findings ### A11y Evidence Finding finding_id: focus-trap-missing fingerprint: 3a7d4e1f source: perspective-audit keyboard_motor checklist wcag_or_apg: 2.1.2 Keyboard Accessible section_508_fpc_context: 1194.22(a) severity: CRITICAL perspective_alarms: keyboard_motor=HIGH, screen_reader_semantic=HIGH, cognitive=HIGH evidence: No focus containment logic in SubscribeModal.jsx reproduction_steps: Open modal with Tab, press Tab repeatedly expected_behavior: Focus should cycle only within modal actual_behavior: Focus reaches background navigation links trend: new ### A11y Evidence Finding finding_id: dialog-role-missing fingerprint: 5b8e2c3a source: perspective-audit screen_reader_semantic checklist wcag_or_apg: 4.1.2 Name, Role, Value section_508_fpc_context: 1194.22(j) severity: CRITICAL perspective_alarms: keyboard_motor=HIGH, screen_reader_semantic=HIGH, cognitive=HIGH evidence: Modal container lacks role="dialog" and aria-labelledby reproduction_steps: Open modal with screen reader expected_behavior: Screen reader announces "Subscribe to Updates, dialog" actual_behavior: Screen reader announces "dialog" without title trend: new
